criteria_results.criterion: scripts/run-validator-b.mjs exists and can execute in dry-run mode without invoking Gemini.
criteria_results.detail: scripts/run-validator-b.mjs exists. Static inspection shows --dry-run returns before spawnCommand and before artifact/ledger writes; validation-evidence.json records the dry-run command exited 0.

criteria_results.criterion: Validator-B runner writes normalized run metadata and result artifacts under tasks/handoffs/{TASK-ID}/.
criteria_results.detail: Non-dry-run paths are derived from the task handoff directory and include validator-b-run-<attempt>.json, validator-b-stdout-<attempt>.json, validator-b-stderr-<attempt>.log, validator-b-prompt-<attempt>.txt, and the expected validator-b-result*.json output.

criteria_results.criterion: Validator-B runner rejects handoffs with agent values other than Validator-B.
criteria_results.detail: parseHandoff throws unless data.agent is exactly "Validator-B".

criteria_results.criterion: Validator-B runner performs the same common secret-like payload preflight as Generator and Validator-A before invoking a model CLI.
criteria_results.detail: The runner imports assertNoSecretLikeContent from scripts/lib/secret-scan.mjs and applies it to the raw handoff, included context files, and final Validator-B prompt before Gemini invocation.

criteria_results.criterion: Harness audit includes Validator-B pipeline checks.
criteria_results.detail: scripts/audit-harness.mjs checks for the package command, Validator-B-only guard, Validator-A independence guard, and Validator-B prompt secret preflight marker; scripts/validate-handoffs.mjs also validates the Validator-B fixture.

criteria_results.criterion: Relevant guides no longer imply Validator-B is missing after implementation.
criteria_results.detail: docs/guides/validator-pipeline-ko.md documents run-validator-b.mjs, Gemini CLI command shape, dry-run, resource-failure handling, and independent handoff requirements. docs/guides/generator-pipeline-ko.md now states the Validator-B wrapper is implemented and only live smoke remains.

criteria_results.criterion: node --check and npm run audit:harness pass.
criteria_results.detail: Direct node/npm execution was blocked by this Validator-A runtime policy, but tasks/handoffs/TASK-20260430-001/validation-evidence.json records exit_code 0 for node --check scripts/run-validator-b.mjs, node --check scripts/validate-handoffs.mjs, node --check scripts/audit-harness.mjs, npm run run:validator-b -- ... --dry-run, npm run audit:harness, and git diff --check.

log.result: Reviewed required architecture/security/validator docs, validator result schema, Task Spec, ledger, Generator result, changed files, Validator-B handoff fixture, and validation evidence artifact.
Verified package command, Validator-B handoff guard, secret preflight coverage, artifact paths, audit checks, fixture validation, and guide updates.

node/npm commands were rejected by the current read-only policy; accepted the referenced validation-evidence.json artifact as proof of successful local node --check, dry-run, npm run audit:harness, and git diff --check.
